task_description: Modernize the Minecraft Finder Flutter application: introduce Provider state management to fix anti-patterns (dynamic casts, broken listener removal, monolithic state), add new features (favorites/bookmarks, search history with replay, 2D map visualization), add comprehensive tests, and create a CI workflow.

verification.summary: flutter analyze --fatal-warnings: 0 issues (fixed 2 pre-existing warnings). flutter test: all 263 tests pass (209 original + 54 new). No dynamic casts. main.dart is 49 lines. All review issues fixed. CI workflow created.
